ddls:
CREATE TABLE "support_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the support package (e.g., Essential, Select, Premier) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the support package */,
  "package_description_long" TEXT /* A longer description of the support package */,
  "package_features" TEXT /* A list of features included in the support package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support package associated with the contract */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the contract */,
  "contract_length" TEXT /* Length of the contract (e.g., 3 or 5 years) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* The current status of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* The date the contract is set to renew */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* The date the contract was cancelled (if applicable) */,
  "auto_renewal" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the contract auto-renews */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The payment method used for the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES support_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* The physical address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* The name of the customer's company (if applicable) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the customer operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support request */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the support request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the support request was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the support request (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "request_category" TEXT /* The category of the support request */,
  "request_priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the support request */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date the support request was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the support request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_requests_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the support agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the support agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the support agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the support agent (e.g., team lead, support analyst) */,
  "agent_availability" TEXT /* The agent's availability */,
  "agent_skills" TEXT /* A list of skills the agent possesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_request_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support request being assigned */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent assigned to the request */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* The status of the assignment */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_request_assignments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES support_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_request_assignments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sla_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SLA metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support package associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the SLA metric (e.g., response time, resolution rate) */,
  "target" REAL /* Target value for the SLA metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* A description of the SLA metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sla_actuals" (
  "actual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual SLA value */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support request associated with the actual value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SLA metric associated with the actual value */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the SLA metric */,
  "actual_date" TEXT /* The date the actual value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sla_actuals_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES sla_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sla_actuals_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES support_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article (e.g., software installation, troubleshooting) */,
  "article_category" TEXT /* The category of the knowledge base article */,
  "article_tags" TEXT /* A list of tags associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base_search_terms" (
  "search_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search term */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the knowledge base article associated with the search term */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term for the article */,
  "search_term_category" TEXT /* The category of the search term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_search_terms_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES knowledge_base ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "on_site_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each on-site support service */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the support service */,
  "support_date" TEXT /* Date the support service was provided */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support service (e.g., essential, select, premier) */,
  "support_details" TEXT /* Details about the on-site support provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_on_site_support_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return shipping option */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the shipping option */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipping option was selected */,
  "shipping_type" TEXT /* Type of shipping option (e.g., ground, next business day) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* The shipping carrier used */,
  "shipping_tracking_number" TEXT /* The tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_shipping_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depot_turn_around_time" (
  "turn_around_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depot turn-around time */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the depot turn-around time */,
  "turn_around_time" TEXT /* Depot turn-around time (e.g., 3 business days) */,
  "turn_around_time_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the depot turn-around time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turn_around_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depot_turn_around_time_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priority_live_agent_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority live agent access */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., M-F, local business hours, 24/7) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details about the priority live agent access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priority_live_agent_access_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., support agent, team lead, administrator) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
